intake: 신규 제품 추천 / 탄소강 / 모름 / Milling / 모름
turn: X-POWER PRO GM834250 제품은 날장이 92mm인데요 이 제품도 DB에 없나요?
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (normalized_code) * FROM catalog_app.product_recommendation_mv WHERE edp_root_category='Milling' AND search_diameter_mm=65 AND material_tags && ARRAY['P']::text[] ORDER BY normalized_code,edp_idx DESC) x

intake: 신규 제품 추천 / 탄소강 / Profiling / Milling / 4mm
filters: diameter: 4 / diameterMin: 40 / diameterMax: 45 / material: P+H / category: Milling / shape: Ball
sql: SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (normalized_code) * FROM catalog_app.product_recommendation_mv WHERE edp_root_category='Milling' AND search_diameter_mm=4 AND search_diameter_mm BETWEEN 40 AND 45 AND material_tags && ARRAY['P','H']::text[] AND search_subtype ILIKE '%ball%' ORDER BY normalized_code,edp_idx DESC) x
